KeysToEntries.Mortar_Ammo_M933HEZone1_Description: The M933 High Explosive (HE) cartridge is designed for use against personnel, bunkers, and light material targets. It features a steel case filled with Composition B explosive and an aluminum M31 fin assembly. The propulsion system consists of an M1020 ignition cartridge and four waterproof, horseshoe-shaped M234 propelling charges.
